mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( RECEIVER_ID, SENDER_ID, TYPE, TARGET_ID, MESSAGE ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID AS notiId, RECEIVER_ID AS receiverId, SENDER_ID AS senderId, TYPE AS type, TARGET_ID AS targetId, MESSAGE AS message, IS_READ AS isRead, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM notification WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId} AND IS_READ = 0 ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId} AND IS_READ = 0
